ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "overall_rating" INTEGER /* Overall rating given by the reviewer */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the purchase was verified */,
  "review_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was submitted */,
  "reviewer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the reviewer */,
  "asin" TEXT /* Amazon Standard Identification Number (ASIN) for the product */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Full text of the customer review */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the review provided by the reviewer */,
  "vote" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review received */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style or version of the product reviewed */,
  "vote_stan" REAL /* Stanine score for the review */,
  "vote_norm" REAL /* Normalized stanine score */,
  "sentiment" INTEGER /* Sentiment score (1 for positive, 0 for neutral/negative) */,
  "product_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the product when reviewed */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image attached to the review */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video attached to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_asin FOREIGN KEY ("asin") REFERENCES products ("asin"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "asin" TEXT /* Amazon Standard Identification Number (ASIN) for the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the product belongs */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_url" TEXT /* URL of the product on the website */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asin"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_manufacturer FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews submitted by the reviewer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the reviewer */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL of the reviewer's profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being voted on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who cast the vote */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., helpful, not helpful) */,
  "vote_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_votes_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is receiving the recommendation */,
  "recommended_product_asin" TEXT /* ASIN of the product being recommended */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_recommended_product_asin FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_product_asin") REFERENCES products ("asin"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_scores" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score ranging from 0 (negative) to 1 (positive) */,
  "analyzer_used" TEXT /* Name of the sentiment analysis tool used */,
  "analysis_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_scores_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "asin" TEXT /* ASIN of the product */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_features_asin FOREIGN KEY ("asin") REFERENCES products ("asin")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewer_stats" (
  "reviewer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by the reviewer */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews submitted by the reviewer */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of helpful votes received by the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_performance" (
  "asin" TEXT /* ASIN of the product */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating received by the product */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews received by the product */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Average sentiment score of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asin")
)
